title: keteleeria davidiana subsp. chien-peii
intro: Keteleeria davidiana subsp. chien-peii, also known as Chien Pei Keteleeria, is a plant species within the Pinaceae family, commonly found in high-altitude mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Keteleeria davidiana subsp. chien-peii include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
